title: Unakenna Venum Sollu Lyrics Yennai Arindhaal Song Lyrics

Unakenna venum sollu Song Lyrics From Yennai Arindhaal
Singers:Benney Dayal, Mahathi

click here for english meaning

Unakenna venum sollu
Ulagaththai kaatta sollu
Pudhu idam pudhu megam
Thaedi povomey.

Pidiththadhai vaanga sollu
Veruppadhai neenga sollu
Pudhu vellam pudhu aaru
Neendhi paarpomey.

Iruvarin pagal iravu
Oru veyil oru nilavu.
Therindhadhu theriyadhadhu
Paarkkaporomey.

Ulagennum paramapadham
Vilundha pin uyarvu varum
Ninaiththadhu ninaiyaadhadhu
Serkkaporomey.

Oru velli kolusu pola
Indha boomi sinungum keela.
Aniyaadha vairam pola
Andha vaanam minungum Mela.(2)

Kanavugal theerndhaal indru
Kalangida koodaadhindru

Thoonga solliyadhe.

Enakkena unnai thandhu

Adhan vazhi enadhu kanaa
Kaana solliyadhey.

Nee adam pidiththaalum
Adangi pogindren.
Unmadi meththai Mel
Madangi kolgindren.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Unakenna Venum Sollu'?

The song expresses deep emotions of longing and desire, reflecting the complexities of love.

How does this song fit into the plot of 'Yennai Arindhaal'?

This song captures the protagonist's emotional journey and his struggles in relationships, enhancing the film's narrative.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Benny Dayal and composed by Harrish Jeyaraj.

When was 'Unakenna Venum Sollu' released?

The song was released on January 1, 2015.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Unakenna Venum Sollu, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions, yearning for connection and understanding. The song's soothing melody and poignant lyrics create a nostalgic atmosphere, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments. It encapsulates the essence of love's complexities, evoking feelings of longing and hope. As part of Yennai Arindhaal, this track significantly contributes to the film's emotional depth.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Unakenna Venum Sollu from Yennai Arindhaal is a captivating melody that beautifully captures the essence of longing and love. With Benny Dayal's soulful voice and Thamarai's poignant lyrics, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the complexities of relationships. The collaboration with Harrish Jeyaraj's enchanting music makes this track a must-listen for all music lovers.
stanzaMeanings: Unakenna venum sollu
Let's find a new place and a new sky.
Tell me what you have caught, tell me your anger, let's look for a new stream and a new river.
Day and night of two people, one sun and one moon. What is known and what is unknown, we will see.
The world is a paradise, after falling down, a rise will come. What is thought will not be remembered, we will unite.
Like a silver anklet, this earth trembles below. Like a precious gem, that sky shines above.
When dreams are fulfilled today, don't get confused. Day by day, memories come and say don't sleep.
You gave me your eyes, and in return, I gave you my vision. That way is my dream, don't forget to say it.
Even if you hold on tight, I am slipping away. My mind is getting lost in the heights.
Unakenna venum sollu
Let's find a new place and a new sky.
Tell me what you have caught, tell me your anger, let's look for a new stream and a new river.
Seasons change, years pass. I found my happiness in you.
In your fingers, I wrote, in your smile, I laughed. I found my poems that crossed over.
Like a storm, the rain falls. In the relationships, your breath is lingering.
